Interface ICheckProgressor

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that report progress in stepped increments with checkmarks.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("BDE22C32-1113-11D2-A272-080009B6F22B")]
public interface ICheckProgressor : IStepProgressor, IProgressor
